sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67838" key="miltwruxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μιλτ-ωρῠχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, μίλτος</foreign>-<sense id="n67838.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mine</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0403.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Amips.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
